types.name: HandleDirection
types.summary: Class with the definition of the handle directions.

enum_values.name: ANGLE
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xy direction. Show a circle as info.

enum_values.name: CLICK
enum_values.summary: handle can be used as button, ...

enum_values.name: PLANE_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xy direction on the defined plane from HandleProperties Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: POINT_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in point direction, defined by the reference and handle point. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: VECTOR_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in the direction defined by the vector from HandleProperties

enum_values.name: XYZ_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xyz direction.

enum_values.name: XY_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xy direction. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: XZ_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xz direction. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: X_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in x-direction. Draw an arrow symbol in x-direction

enum_values.name: YZ_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in yz direction. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: Y_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in y-direction. Draw an arrow symbol in y-direction

enum_values.name: Z_COORD
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in point direction, defined by the reference and handle point. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: Z_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in z-direction. Draw an arrow symbol in z-direction

enum_values.name: angle
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XYZ_DIR

enum_values.name: plane_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use PLANE_DIR

enum_values.name: point_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use POINT_DIR

enum_values.name: vector_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use VECTOR_DIR

enum_values.name: x_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use X_DIR

enum_values.name: xy_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XY_DIR

enum_values.name: xyz_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XYZ_DIR

enum_values.name: xz_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XZ_DIR

enum_values.name: y_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use Y_DIR

enum_values.name: yz_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use YZ_DIR

enum_values.name: z_coord
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XYZ_DIR

types.name: HandleParameterType
types.summary: The parameter type defines the function to be used to recalculate the value of the parameter property assigned to the handle.

enum_values.name: ANGLE
enum_values.summary: Calculate the angle from the xy-plane vector between the reference and handle point

enum_values.name: CHECK_BOX
enum_values.summary: Use the handle as checkbox

enum_values.name: DECREMENT_BUTTON
enum_values.summary: Use the handle as button to decrement the value

enum_values.name: INCREMENT_BUTTON
enum_values.summary: Use the handle as button to increment the value

enum_values.name: POINT
enum_values.summary: Set the value to the handle point

enum_values.name: POINT_DISTANCE
enum_values.summary: Calculate the value from the distance between the reference and handle point

enum_values.name: VECTOR_DISTANCE
enum_values.summary: Calculate the value from the distance between the reference and handle point, transformed to the vector direction assigned to the HandleProperties

enum_values.name: X_DISTANCE
enum_values.summary: Calculate the value from the x-distance between the reference and handle point

enum_values.name: Y_DISTANCE
enum_values.summary: Calculate the value from the y-distance between the reference and handle point

enum_values.name: Z_COORD
enum_values.summary: Calculate the value for the "ZMin" or "ZMax" parameter. The distance between these values is adapted to the distance between the reference and handle point

enum_values.name: Z_DISTANCE
enum_values.summary: Calculate the value from the z-distance between the reference and handle point

methods.summary: Font size conversions. It is a font special factor (0.714) being applied in order to associate the mm unit with the real glyph size (like for vector fonts) without sub and superscripts space. So these function do not provide common standard point/twips/millimeter conversions!!! Converts mm to twips
methods.remarks: Font size conversions. It is a font special factor (0.714) being applied in order to associate the mm unit with the real glyph size (like for vector fonts) without sub and superscripts space. So these function do not provide common standard point/twips/millimeter conversions!!! Converts mm to twips

methods.name: GetFirstValidPredefinedFontID

methods.remarks: Returns ID of the first existing predefined TTF font

methods.name: GetFontID
methods.summary: Return ID for the given font Return the ID for the given font name. ID is the index to the table m_PreDefinedFontNameList. etval 0 Dialog Font ID etval 1-20 ID of the hardcoded Allplan's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval 21-63 ID of the hardcoded system's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval >=SYSTEM_FONT_ID (1000) ID of the system TTF font ( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval >=NON_EXISTING_FONT_ID(10000) ID of the font that isn't installed nor exists in the predefined table( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval INVALID_FONT_ID(N_FONT_INTERNAL_MIN_ID - 1) Invalid ID, font with given name doesn't exist
methods.remarks: Return ID for the given font Return the ID for the given font name. ID is the index to the table m_PreDefinedFontNameList. etval 0 Dialog Font ID etval 1-20 ID of the hardcoded Allplan's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval 21-63 ID of the hardcoded system's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval >=SYSTEM_FONT_ID (1000) ID of the system TTF font ( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval >=NON_EXISTING_FONT_ID(10000) ID of the font that isn't installed nor exists in the predefined table( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval INVALID_FONT_ID(N_FONT_INTERNAL_MIN_ID - 1) Invalid ID, font with given name doesn't exist

methods.name: PointGlobalEx
methods.summary: Transform the local coordinates to world coordinates. This method compute global point by offset related to axis of clothoid (clothoid with parallel=0). This method is faster and computing global point with higher precision. Use PointGlobalEx with PointLocalEx cooperation only. sa PointLocalEx, TransformClothoidLocalOffset
methods.remarks: Transform the local coordinates to world coordinates. This method compute global point by offset related to axis of clothoid (clothoid with parallel=0). This method is faster and computing global point with higher precision. Use PointGlobalEx with PointLocalEx cooperation only. sa PointLocalEx, TransformClothoidLocalOffset

params.name: offset
params.doc: Distance from start point on axis curve

returns.doc: Global point on the geometry by offset on axis curve,

methods.name: PointLocalEx
methods.summary: Calculate the local coordinates on a 2D clothoid PointLocalEx compute local point related to axis of clothoid (clothoid with parallel=0). This method is faster and computing X coordinate with higher precision. Use PointGlobalEx with PointLocalEx cooperation only. PointGlobalEx, TransformClothoidLocalOffset
methods.remarks: Calculate the local coordinates on a 2D clothoid PointLocalEx compute local point related to axis of clothoid (clothoid with parallel=0). This method is faster and computing X coordinate with higher precision. Use PointGlobalEx with PointLocalEx cooperation only. PointGlobalEx, TransformClothoidLocalOffset

returns.doc: Axis local point on the 2D clothoid,

methods.name: TransformClothoidLocalOffset
methods.summary: Transform local offset between clothoid axis curve and parallel curve This function provides transformation between offset related to axis or parallel(real) curve. This function is useful when you have offset on parallel curve and want to get length of axis curve. If clothoid parameter Parallel is zero, then axis and parallel offsets are equal. Sample: calc real length of clothoid ndouble real_length = Service::Length(clot); double curve_length = TransformClothoidLocalOffset(clot, clot.Getlength(), false); real_length and curve_length are equal.
methods.remarks: Transform local offset between clothoid axis curve and parallel curve This function provides transformation between offset related to axis or parallel(real) curve. This function is useful when you have offset on parallel curve and want to get length of axis curve. If clothoid parameter Parallel is zero, then axis and parallel offsets are equal. Sample: calc real length of clothoid ndouble real_length = Service::Length(clot); double curve_length = TransformClothoidLocalOffset(clot, clot.Getlength(), false); real_length and curve_length are equal.

params.name: toAxis
params.doc: If true, then offset is offset on parallel curve and result will be offset on axis curve.

returns.doc: Offset on axis or parallel curve, dependent on toAxis.
